ui.about_us.what_we_do.description: Any product or customization plan can be ordered or purchased in personal correspondence. An event, be it a friend's birthday, a loved one's, or a good acquaintance's
ui.about_us.style.description: Decoration // props for events, photo shoots, or cosplay suits (all naturally in the channel's style - I do not make anime products!!!)
ui.about_us.details.description: Details are discussed, everything is clarified, deadlines are announced. I only take money after the order is made and delivered❗️Prepayment is possible when working with expensive/rare materials
ui.catalogue.descriptions.axes: Your axe head (any condition, within reason, of course) + my handle, work (cleaning, polishing, wedging, design, etc.), sharpening, coating application. Cost: 2000 rubles (small/medium) ~ 3000 rubles (large). If the head is mine, we'll agree on the budget for the metal + the previous point – work. Of course, there are always ready-made axes for sale. They are usually cheaper, but you don't get to choose the design (Nevertheless, I assure you, you won't lose anything in quality👍)
